_note: 2026 IRCC category-based draw definitions. Eligibility threshold is encoded here (not in code) so it can be updated without a code deploy. All NOC codes listed are from the NOC 2021 classification.

eligibilityThreshold._note: Must have at least 12 months of qualifying work experience in an eligible occupation within the last 3 years. Need not be continuous.

categories.name: French-language proficiency
categories.description: For candidates with strong French-language proficiency, regardless of occupation.
categories.descriptionFa: برای متقاضیانی با مهارت قوی در زبان فرانسه، صرف نظر از شغل.
categories._nocNote: No NOC restriction for French category
